summary:
Perfect! The test passed. The issue was indeed the schema drift problem where the Go code was using the old column name `status` instead of the renamed column `order_status`. I fixed both the INSERT and SELECT statements in the Go code to use the correct column name, and now all tests pass.

The needle in the haystack was the mismatch between the database schema (which had been migrated to use `order_status`) and the application code (which was still trying to use `status`).
